scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web --if-present
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start -w apps/api
